login.title: Sign in
login.locked: This account is temporarily locked. Please wait and try again, or contact your administrator

register.title: Request an account
register.description: Enter your email address and we will send you instructions to complete the registration.
register.sent: We sent an email with instructions. Follow the link in the email to complete your registration. If it does not arrive, please check the address you entered.

complete.title: Set your password
complete.description: Set a password to complete your registration.
complete.displayNameHelp: Optional. Your email address is shown if left blank
complete.done: You will be able to sign in after an administrator approves your account. We will notify you by email.
complete.invalidToken: This link is invalid or has expired. Please submit a new registration request.
complete.missingToken: Invalid link. Please use the link in the email.

home.title: Home
home.placeholder: Data maintenance features are coming in future releases. User management (administrators only) is available now.

error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
